block.header: yakumo tatu idumo yapyegaki tumagome ni yapyegaki tukuru so no yapyegaki wo
ame n aru ya ototanabata no unagaseru tama no misumaru no anatama pa ya mitani putawatarasu adisukitakapikwone
amasakaru pina tu mye no iwatarasu setwo isikapa kataputi kataputi ni ami pariwatasi mero yosi ni yosi yorikone isikapa kataputi
okitumo pa pye ni pa yoredomo sanedoko mo atapanu kamo yo pama tu tidori yo
okitutori kamo duku sima ni wa ga winesi imo pa wasurazi yo no kotogoto mo
akadama no pikari pa ari to pito pa ipedo kimi ga yosopi si taputwoku arikyeri

uda no takakwi ni sigiwana paru wa ga matu ya sigi pa sayarazu isukupasi kudira sayari kwonami ga na kopasaba tatisoba no mwi no nakyeku wo kokwisi pwiwene upanari ga na kopasaba itisakakwi mwi no opokyeku wo kokwida pwiwene
kamukazeno isenoumi no opoisi ni ya ipapimotoporu sitadami no sitadami no agwo yo agwo yo sitadami no ipapimotopori utite si yamamu utite si yamamu
osaka no opomurwoya ni pito sapani iri wori tomo pito sapani kiiri wori tomo mitumitusi kume no kwora ga kubututui isitutui moti utite si yamamu
ima pa yo ima pa yo aa siyawo ima dani mo agwo yo ima dani mo agwo yo
emisi wo pidari momo na pito pito pa ipedomo tamukapi mo sezu
tatanamete inasanoyama no konoma yu mo iyukimamorapi tatakapeba ware pa ya wenu simatutori ukapi ga tomo ima suke ni kone
mitumitusi kume no kwora ga kakimoto ni apapu ni pa kamira pitomoto sono ga moto soneme tunagite utite si yamamu
mitumitusi kume no kwora ga kakimoto ni uwesi pazikami kutibipiku ware pa wasurezu utite si yamamu
ko no miki pa wa ga miki narazu yamato nasu opomononusi no kamisi miki ikupisa ikupisa
umasake miwa no tono no asatwo ni mo idete yukana miwa no tono wo
umasake miwa no tono no asatwo ni mo osibirakane miwa no tonotwo wo
mimakwiiribikwo pa ya ono ga wo wo sisemu to nusumaku sirani pimyenaswobi su mo
opoki two ywori ukakapite korosamu to suraku wo sirani pimyenaswobi su mo
oposaka ni tuginoboreru isimura wo tagwosi ni kwosaba kwosikatemu kamo
yakumotatu idumotakyeru ga pakyeru tati tudura sapa maki samwi nasi ni apare
pasikiyosi wagipye no kata yu kumowi tatiku mo
yamato pa kuni no maporama tatanaduku awokakiyamakomoreru yamato si urupasi
inoti no masokyemu pito pa tatamikomo pyeguri no yama no sirakasi ga ye wo uzu ni sase ko no kwo
asasimo no mike no sawobasi mapye tu kimi iwatarasu mo mike no sawobasi
nipibari tukupa wo sugwite ikuywo ka neturu
kaga nabete ywo ni pa kokonoywo pi ni pa towoka wo
wopari ni tadani mukapyeru pitotumatu apare pitotumatu pito ni ariseba kinu kisemasi wo tati pakemasi wo

wotikata no araramatubara matubara ni watariyukite tukuyumi ni mariya wo tagupe umapito pa umapitodwoti ya itwokwo pa mo itwokwodwoti iza apana ware pa tamakiparu uti no aso ga para n uti pa isagwo are ya iza apana ware pa
iza agi isatisukune tamakiparu uti no aso ga kubututi no itate opazupa nipodorino kaduki sena
apuminomi seta no watari ni kaduku tori me ni si miyeneba ikidoporosi mo
apuminomi seta no watari ni kaduku tori tanakami sugwite udi ni torapetu
ko no miki pa wa ga miki narazu kusi no kami tokoyo ni imasu ipatatasu sukunamikamwi no toyopoki pokimotoposi kamupoki pokikuruposi maturikosi miki so asazu wose sasa
ko no miki wo kamikyemu pito pa so no tudumi usu ni tatete utapitutu kamikyeme kamo ko no miki no ayani utadanwosi sasa
tibano kadunwo wo mireba momotidaru yanipa mo miyu kuni no po mo miyu

iza agi nwo ni piru tumi ni piru tumi ni wa ga yuku miti ni kagupasi panatatibana siduyera pa pito mwina tori potuye pa tori wigarasi mitugurino naka tu ye no pupogomori akareru wotomye iza sakaba ye na
midu tamaru yosami no ike ni nunapa kuripapekyeku sirani wigupi tuku kapamataye no pisigara no sasikyeku sirani a ga kokoro si iya ukwonisite
mitinosiri kwopadawotomye wo kamwi no goto kikoyesikado apimakuramaku
mitinosiri kwopadawotomye araswopazu nesiku wo si zo urupasimi mopu
kasi no pu ni yokusu wo tukuri yokusu ni kamyeru opomiki umarani kikosi moti wose marogati
apadisima iya putanarabi adukisima iya putanarabi yorosiki simasima ta ka tasarearatisi kibwi n aru imo wo apimituru mono
karanwo wo sipo ni yaki si ga amari koto ni tukuri kakipiku ya yura no two no twonaka no ikuri ni puretatu nadu no kwi no sayasaya
tipayapito udi no watari ni sawotwori ni payakyemu pito si wa ga mokwo ni komu

tipayapito udi no watari ni wataride ni tateru adusayumi mayumi ikiramu to kokoro pa mopedo itworamu to kokoro pa mopedo motopye pa kimi wo omopide suwepye pa imo wo omopide iranakyeku soko ni omopi kanasikyeku koko ni omopi ikirazu so kuru adusayumi mayumi
minasokopu omi no wotomye wo tare yasinapamu
mikasipo parimapayamati ipakudasu kasikwoku tomo are yasinapamu
umapito no taturu kotodate usayuduru tayema tugamu ni narabete moga mo
koromo koso putapye mo yoki saywodoko wo narabemu kimi pa kasikwoki rokamo
ositeru nanipa no saki no narabipama narabemu to koso so no kwo pa arikyeme
natumusi no pimusi no koromo putapye kite kakumiyadari pa ani yoku mo arazu
asaduma no pika no wosaka wo katanaki ni miti yuku mono mo tagupite zo yoki
nanipapito suzupune torase kosi nadumi so no pune torase opomipune tore
yamasiro ni isikye toriyama isikye sikye a ga mopu tuma ni isikiapamu kamo
tuginepu yamasirogapa wo kapa nobori wa ga noboreba kapakuma ni tatisakayuru momotarazu yaswoba no kwi pa opokimi rokamo
tuginepu yamasirogapa wo miya nobori wa ga noboreba awoniyosi nara wo sugwi wodate yamato wo sugwi wa ga migaposi kuni pa kadurakwi takamiya wagipye no atari
yamasiro no tutukwi no miya ni monomawosu wa ga se wo mireba namitagumasi mo
tunwosapapu ipa no pimye ga oporokani kikosanu uragupa no kwi yoru masiziki kapa no kumaguma yoropopiyuku kamo uragupa no kwi
tuginepu yamasiromye no kokupa moti utisi opone sawasawani na ga ipyese koso utiwatasu yagapaye nasu kiiri mawikure
tuginepu yamasiromye no kokupa moti utisi opone nezirwono sirwotadamuki makazukyeba koso sirazu to mo ipame
pisakatano amekanabata myedori ga oru kanabata payabusawake no miosupigane
payabusa pa ame ni nobori tobikakeri ituki ga upe no sazaki torasane
pasitateno sagasiki yama mo wagimokwo to putari kwoyureba yasumusiro kamo
tamakiparu uti no aso na koso pa yo no topopito na koso pa kuni no nagapito akidusima yamatonokuni ni kari kwomu to na pa kikasu ya
yasumisisi wa ga opokimi pa ubenaubena ware wo twopasu na akidusima yamatonokuni ni kari kwomu to ware pa kikazu
oposaka ni apu ya wotomye wo miti twopeba tadani pa norazu tagimati wo noru
wa ga sekwo ga ku beki yopi nari sasaganeno kumo no okonapi koyopi sirusisi mo
sasaragata nisiki no pimo wo tokisakete amata pa nezuni tada pitoywo nomwi
panagupasi sakura no mede koto medeba payaku pa medezu wa ga meduru kwora
tokosipeni kimi mo ape ya mo isanatori umi no pamamo no yoru tokidoki wo
asipikwino yamada wo tukuri yamadakami sitabwi wo wasise sitanaki ni wa ga naku tuma katanaki ni wa ga naku tuma kozo koso yasuku pada pure
opokimi wo sima ni paburi punaamari ikapyerikomu zo wa ga tatami yume koto wo koso tatami to ipame wa ga tuma wo yume
amadamu karuwotomye ita nakaba pito sirinu bemi pasa no yama no patwo no sitanaki ni naku
opomapye womapye sukune ga kanatwokage kaku tatiyorane ame tatiyamemu
miyapito no ayupi no kwosuzu otiniki to miyapito toyomu satwobito mo yume
omi no kwo pa tape no pakama wo nanapye wosi nipa ni tatasite aywopi nadasu mo

yamato no womura no take ni sisi pusu to tare ka ko no koto opomapye ni mawosu opokimi pa soko wo kikasite tamamaki no agwora ni tatasi situmaki no agwora ni tatasi sisi matu to wa ga imaseba sawi matu to wa ga tataseba takupura ni amu kakituki so no amu wo akidu payakupi papu musi mo opokimi ni maturapu na ga kata pa okamu akidusima yamato

yamato no womura no take ni sisi pusu to tare ka ko no koto opokimi ni mawosu opokimi pa soko wo kikasite tamamaki no agwora ni imasi situmaki no agwora ni tatasi sisi matu to wa ga imaseba sawi matu to wa ga tataseba takupura ni amu kakituki so no amu wo akidu payakupi papu musi mo kaku no goto na ni opamu to sworamitu yamatonokuni wo akidusima to ipu
yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no aswobasisi sisi no utaki kasikwomi wa ga nigenoborisi ariwo no upe no pari ga yeda ase wo
komorikuno patusenoyama pa idetati no yorosiki yama wasiride no yorosiki yama no komorikuno patusenoyama pa ayani uragupasi ayani uragupasi
kamukazeno ise no ise no nwo no sakaye wo i po puru kakite si ga tukuru madeni opokimi ni kataku tukapematuramu to wa ga inoti mo nagaku moga to ipisi takumi pa ya ataratakumi pa ya
yamanobye no kwosimakwo yuweni pito terapu uma no yatugwi pa wosikyeku mo nasi
atarasiki winabye no takumi kakesi suminapa si ga nakyeba tare ka kakemu yo atarasuminapa
nubatamano kapwi no kurwokwoma kura kiseba inoti sinamasi kapwi no kurwokwoma
nubatamano kapwi no kurwokwoma kura kiseba isikazu aramasi kapwi no kurwokwoma
miti ni apu ya wosirwo no kwo amo ni koso kikoyezu arame kuni ni pa kikoyetena
inamusiro kapaswopiyanagwi midu yukeba nabiki okwitati so no ne pa usezu
yamatopye ni migaposi mono pa osinumi no ko no takakwi n aru tunusasi no miya
asadipara wosone wo sugwi momodutapu nute yuraku mo yo okime ku rasi mo
okime mo yo apumi no okime asu ywori pa miyamagakurite miyezu ka mo aramu
sipose no nawori wo mireba aswobikuru sibi ga patade ni tuma tateri miyu
minatwo no nawori wo mireba aswobikuru sibi ga patade ni tuma tateri miyu
omi no kwo no yapye ya karakaki yuruse to ya mikwo
opotati wo tarepakitatite nukazu tomo suwe patasite mo apamu to zo omopu
opokimi no yapye no kumikaki kakamedomo na wo amasizimi kakanu kumikaki
omi no kwo no yapu no sibakaki sita toyomi nawi ga yorikoba yaremu sibakaki
omi no kwo no yapye kara kaki sita toyomi nawi ga yorikoba yaremu sibakaki
kotogami ni kiwiru kagepimye tama naraba a ga poru tama no apabisiratama
opokimi no miobi no situpata musubitare tare ya si pito mo apiomopanaku ni

isunokami puru wo sugwite komomakura takapasi sugwi monosapani opoyake sugwi parupi kasuga wo sugwi tumagomoru wosapo wo sugwi tamake ni pa ipi sape mori tamamopi ni midu sape mori nakisopotiyuku mo kagepimye apare
awoni yosi nara no pasama ni sisizimono miduku pyegomori minasosoku sibi no wakugwo wo asaridu na wi no kwo

yasimakuni tuma makikanete parupino kasuga no kuni ni kupasi mye wo ari to kikite yorosi mye wo ari to kikite makwi saku pi no itatwo wo osipiraki ware irimasi atwodwori tumadwori site makuradwori tumadwori site imo ga te wo ware ni makasime wa ga te woba imo ni makasime masakidura tadakiazapari sisikusiro umai nesi twoni nipatutori kakye pa naku nari nututori kigisi pa toyomu pasikyeku mo imada ipazute akenikyeri wagimo

komorikuno patusenokapa yu nagarekuru take no ikumidake yodake moto pye woba koto ni tukuri suwepye woba puye ni tukuri pukinasu mimoro ga upe ni noboritati wa ga miseba tunusapapu ipare no ike no minasitapu uwo mo upe n idete nageku yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no obaseru sasarano miobi no musubitare tare ya si pito mo upe n idete nageku
pirakata yu puye puki noboru apumi no ya kena no wakugwo i puye puki noboru
karakuni wo ikani pu koto so medurakwo kitaru mukasakuru iki no watari wo medurakwo kitaru
karakuni no kwi no pe ni tatite opobakwo pa pire purasu mo yamato pye mukite
karakuni no kwi no pe ni tatasi opobakwo pa pire purasu miyu nanipa pye mukite

yasumisisi wa ga opokimi no kakurimasu ama no yaswokage idetatasu miswora wo mireba yoroduyo ni kaku si moga mo tiyo ni mo kaku si moga mo tiyo ni mo kaku si moga mo kasikwomite tukapematu ramu worogamite tukapematu ramu utadukimaturu
swoga yo swoga no kwora pa uma naraba pimuka no kwoma tati naraba kure no masapi ube si ka mo swoga no kwora wo opokimi no tukapasu rasiki
sinateru katawokayama ni ipi ni wete koyaseru so no tapito apare oya nasi ni nare narikyeme ya sasutakeno kimi pa ya naki ipi ni wete koyaseru so no tapito apare
unebwiyama kotati usukyedo tanomi mo kyetu no wakugwo no komoraserikyemu
yamato no osi no pirose wo wataramu to aywopi tadukuri kosidukurapu mo
ipa no pe ni kwosaru kome yaku kome dani mo tagete toporase kamasisi no wodi
mukatuwo ni tateru sera ga nikwode koso wa ga te wo torame ta ga sakwide sakwide so mo ya wa ga te torasu mo ya
parwobarwoni koto so kikoyuru sima no yabupara
wotikata no asanwo no kigisi toyomosazu ware pa nesikado pito so toyomosu
wobayasi ni ware wo pikirete sesi pito no omote mo sirazu ipye mo sirazu mo
utumasa pa kamwi to mo kamwi to kikoyekuru tokoyo no kamwi wo utikitamasu mo
yamagapa ni wosi putatu wite tagupi yoku tagupyeru imo wo tare winikyemu
moto gotoni pana pa sakedomo nani to ka mo utukusi imo ga mata sakidekonu
kanakwi tuke a ga kapu kwoma pa pikide sezu a ga kapu kwoma wo pito mitu ramu
imakwi n aru mure ga upe ni kumo dani mo siruku si tataba nani ka nagekamu
iyu sisi wo tunagu kapapye no wakakusa no wakaku ariki to a ga mopanaku ni
asukagapa minagirapitutu yuku midu no apida mo naku mo omopoyuru kamo
yama kwoyete umi wataru tomo omosirwoki imakwi no uti pa wasurayu masizi
minatwo no usipo no kudari unakudari usirwo mo kure ni okite yukamu
utukusiki a ga wakaki kwo wo okite yukamu
pirakutuma no tukureru wonopyeda wo karigari no kurapu mikari no tawamito wonopyeda wo karigari no kurapu mikoto yowamito wonopyeda wo karigari no kurapu
kimi ga me no kwoposiki karani patete wite kaku ya kwopwimu mo kimi ga me wo pori
utipasi no tume no aswobi ni idemase kwo tamade no ipye no yapyekwo no twozi idemasi no kui pa arazi zo idemase kwo tamade no pye no yapyekwo no twozi
tatibana pa ono ga yedayeda nareredomo tama ni nuku toki oyazi wo ni nuku
miyesinwo no yesinwo no ayu ayu koso pa simape mo yeki e kurusi we nagwi no moto seri no moto are pa kurusi we
omi no kwo no yapye no pimo toku pitopye dani imada tokaneba mikwo no pimo toku
akagwoma no iyukipabakaru makuzupara nani no tutekoto tadani si yekyemu
